name: HTML5 Canvas Shape select, resize and rotate - Konva.js
snippet: Learn how to select, resize, and rotate shapes on HTML5 Canvas with Konva.js Transformer. Add interactive handles for resizing and rotating any shape.

name: How to transform the canvas objects while keeping opposite side fixed?
snippet: Implemented resizing using handles: I added multiple resize handles around the object. Each handle adjusts the width and height when dragged. snippet: The CanvasRenderingContext2D.rotate() method of the Canvas 2D API adds a rotation to the transformation matrix.

name: How do I rotate individual shapes on an html5 canvas?

name: How to resize and rotate canvas shapes with Vue and Konva?
snippet: Instructions: Click on a shape to select it. You can then resize and rotate it using the transformer handles. The shape will change color after transformation.
